title: Facilitator Guide — Day 14 — Growth Engine
prepChecklist: Review squad Business Engine Canvas completions from Day 3
Open Growth Engine Worksheet preview in Playbook staff view
Prepare squad breakout for stress-test activity
Confirm Friday Venture Pitch schedule and Investor Demo Day framing

sessionFlow.notes: Reflect on Business Engine. Introduce capacity limits. Discussion: what happens when demand exceeds capacity?
Capacity vs activity. Growth Engine Canvas workshop. Update FEC Box 6.

sessionFlow.activity: The Numbers That Drive Growth — Slides 6–7
sessionFlow.notes: Revenue goal, clients required, monthly and weekly targets. Squad stress test.
FEC three-year narrative. Peer pitch prep. Close with venture accelerator tone — not recruitment.

closingMessage: Participants leave knowing how their venture will grow, what numbers they need, and how they will build capacity for Friday's Investor Demo Day.
